Variant A: Free shipping framing

Use this canonical fixture to validate editor and front-end parity around shell styling, spacing, and CTA rhythm.

Variant B: Limited-time framing

This alternate variant keeps the same structure while changing the copy so the two active states stay visually comparable.

HTML; $postarr = array( 'ID' => $post_id, 'post_author' => 1, 'post_content' => $post_content, 'post_excerpt' => $post_excerpt, 'post_name' => $post_slug, 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_title' => $post_title, 'post_type' => 'post', ); if ( get_post( $post_id ) ) { wp_update_post( $postarr ); } else { $wpdb->insert( $wpdb->posts, array( 'ID' => $post_id, 'post_author' => 1, 'post_date' => $post_date, 'post_date_gmt' => $post_date_gmt, 'post_content' => $post_content, 'post_title' => $post_title, 'post_excerpt' => $post_excerpt, 'post_status' => 'publish', 'comment_status' => 'closed', 'ping_status' => 'closed', 'post_password' => '', 'post_name' => $post_slug, 'to_ping' => '', 'pinged' => '', 'post_modified' => $post_date, 'post_modified_gmt' => $post_date_gmt, 'post_content_filtered' => '', 'post_parent' => 0, 'guid' => home_url( '/?p=' . $post_id ), 'menu_order' => 0, 'post_type' => 'post', 'post_mime_type' => '', 'comment_count' => 0, ), array( '%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d', '%s', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%d', ) ); } clean_post_cache( $post_id );
